articles.description: Marcus North, a former Australia international and Durham's director of cricket, is set to become the first foreigner in charge of selecting the England men's team.
articles.title: Marcus North: Australian set to be named England selector

articles.description: Aston Villa face their defining moment under Unai Emery in Thursday's Europa League semi-final second leg against Nottingham Forest.
articles.title: Aston Villa: Europa League semi-final represents squad's defining moment

articles.description: Luis Enrique's expertise at rebuilding a culture as well as a football team means Arsenal will confront the complete package when they meet holders Paris St-Germain in the Champions League final.
articles.title: Champions League: Why Paris St-Germain pose ultimate test for Arsenal in Budapest final

articles.description: A BBC Sport investigation finds misleading adverts for fitness apps that use AI-generated instructors to make exaggerated claims.
articles.title: The AI fitness instructors selling unreal gains

articles.description: Khadija Shaw is likely to leave Manchester City this summer after talks stalled over a new contract.
articles.title: Manchester City: Khadija Shaw likely to leave Women's Super League champions this summer

articles.description: Liverpool cut the size of their planned rise in ticket prices for the next couple of seasons after fan protests.
articles.title: Liverpool: Premier League champions reduce planned ticket price rises after fan protests

articles.description: Fifa president Gianni Infantino says he will "personally bring a hot dog and a Coke" to anyone who buys a World Cup final ticket for $2m.
articles.title: Gianni Infantino: Fifa president offers $2m World Cup ticket buyers 'a hot dog and a Coke'

articles.description: What makes Indian sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi so effective and what could be next for the 15-year-old after his Indian Premier League success?
articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: What next for IPL's 15-year-old wonderkid?

articles.description: Harry Kane's late goal on Wednesday could not take Bayern Munich to the final - but it might earn the Bundesliga an extra Champions League place.
articles.title: Harry Kane's goal could get Germany an extra Champions League place

articles.description: Aston Villa midfielder and former England international Lucy Staniforth did not hesitate when she made the decision to retire from football at the end of the season.
articles.title: Lucy Staniforth: Former England midfielder 'at ease' with decision to retire from football
